sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">Tetr. = Tetrabiblos,</title_> ed. J. Camerarius, Nürnberg 1535, cited by page of reprint, Basel 1553 (with Lat. transl. by P. Melanchthon). Ps.-Ptol. <title_ TEIform="title">Centil. = Centiloquium</title_> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καρπός</foreign>), post <title_ TEIform="title">Tetrabiblon</title_> editum. Scholia in Ptolemaei Tetrabiblon, Basel 1559; v. Porphyrius.</item>
